candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line and preferred candidate; suitable as a revenue label that may vary over time.
Direct top-line sales label; also populated and equal to Total Revenue in preview.
Balancing row, not appropriate when explicit revenue rows exist.

variables.notes: Using direct revenue labels as a priority list; Net sales is the most specific top-line label, with Total Revenue as fallback.

candidates.why: Best direct cost-of-sales style line; appears immediately below revenue and represents direct production/service costs.
Could be a component of cost of sales, but not preferable to the broader direct-cost line when a fuller COGS-style row exists.

candidates.row_label: Other Raw Materials and External Services
candidates.why: Could relate to direct costs, but appears empty/less clear than Materials and services.
Balance sheet asset-related line, not income-statement COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the broad direct-cost row rather than subcomponents.

candidates.why: Could be operating overhead, but wording is ambiguous and may be part of materials/services rather than SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Other Raw Materials and External Services
candidates.why: Likely direct input costs, not SG&A overhead.
Classic operating overhead/personnel cost line and appropriate SG&A component.
Classic operating overhead bucket and appropriate SG&A component.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row exists. Selected overhead components and excluded direct costs, depreciation/amortization, and finance items.
No dedicated research and development line is present in the income statement preview.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line, populated in multiple years; useful fallback if no specific interest-expense line is available.
Most specific interest expense label and preferred for years where reported.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest component only; too narrow for primary XINT but may indicate composition.
Non-interest finance costs; not preferred for XINT.
Other finance costs, not specifically interest.
Semantically correct specific interest label, though preview values are empty; valid as possible alternate label over time.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure only; too narrow for primary XINT.

variables.notes: Priority list favors specific interest-expense labels first, then broad financial expenses as fallback for years without a dedicated interest line.

candidates.why: Only one equity component, not full book equity.
Best choice because it appears to exclude non-controlling interests; adding Non-controlling interests equals Total equity in the preview.
Appears to include non-controlling interests; not preferred when a parent-equity line exists separately.
Balancing row, not appropriate when explicit equity totals exist.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet equation, not equity.

variables.notes: Selected Total Equity because it excludes non-controlling interests based on the arithmetic relationship to Total equity.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not preferred over balance sheet NCI for MIB.
Income statement allocation line, not preferred over balance sheet NCI for MIB.

Also a direct balance sheet NCI label and appropriate fallback.
